BENEFITS OF BEING ON AMAZON
It’s common to add up to 50% (or
more) of your current DTC revenue
Customers trust Amazon so
conversions rates are sky high
Use FBA for easy inventory
management and shipping
Ads are really efficient, we see TROAS
as high as 15-25x. Yes you read that
right!
You can retarget and remarket to
Amazon customers now
You’re losing sales that you pay for
on Meta if you aren’t on Amazon

Full funnel ad approach using all
placements Amazon offers:
Search ads, Headline Ads, Display
ads, DSP ads, Sponsored TV
Simple video ads instead of high-
production style ads
Making data-driven decisions
LTV, AOV, CAC, TACOS

products and increasing AOV

Competitor ASIN (products)

-- 18 of 32 --

TIKTOK SHOP
FUTURE OF SOCIAL COMMERCE
As marketers we’re used to testing.
1.TikTok Shop flips the game upside down and shows us that we don’t need to test creatives
anymore, but CREATORS themselves
2.The virality aspect of the platform itself means the risk of NOT participating in this game is
higher than the risk of not performing.
3.TikTok Shop is still so new and as we know, the beginning phases of these new platforms
are usually regarded as the “glory days.”

-- 19 of 32 --

TIKTOK SHOP
NEW OUTREACH LIMITS
Changes the game:
1.Sourcing creators is a numbers game, this
limits new brands however, the concept is
still the same, maximize your outreach limit
every week (most new brands are still
allowed 1000 outreaches weekly)
2.Nourishment of creators: before we can test
a creator once and move on to someone
else because there was no limit. Now it
becomes more important to give these
creators feedback on the video and try to
get more videos out of each one (at least in
the beginning)
3.Leverage software to hit these limits (unless
you have an army of VA’s)

-- 20 of 32 --

TIKTOK SHOP
You NEED creators to post organic content.
Content from your own account is not enough
to move the needle.
People buy from other people, they don’t like
being told to buy something directly from a
brand.
BAD has begun to migrate the BEST
performing creators of ALL the brands we
work with to our own 1st Party platform so we
can cross-utilize with the other brands we
work with.
Creators are KING 👑

-- 21 of 32 --

TIKTOK SHOP
First surfaced in February but has been seen
more recently and shows how powerful this
platform can be.
ESPECIALLY when taking into account TikTok’s
co-funding incentives offers they can run
where they will split the cost of a 20% OFF
discount with brands (i.e brand slashes 10% and
tiktok covers the other 10%)
TikTok is running google
ads for you!

-- 22 of 32 --

TIKTOK SHOP
UTILIZE THE SPY TOOLS Leverage the visibility available
1.Tools like Fast Moss and
Kalodata offer visibility into
best-performing products
on TikTok shops, trends, and
average commission rates
other brands are offering so
we can place ourselves
competitively in the market
2.A must have in the tech
stack

-- 25 of 32 --

#1 LISTICLES
Very few brands actually do this.
Listicles like “6 Reasons Why Mitopure is
Your Key To Healthy Aging” can be a
gamechanger for your brand.
We’ve seen CPAs drop 20%-50%
compared to sending traffic to a regular
Product Page (right screenshot).
A/B test different headlines first.
Ex: 6 Reasons Why Mitopure Will
Scientifically Help You Live Longer
Then test the different reasons below.
VS

-- 26 of 32 --

#1 LISTICLES
Here’s another example of a
listicle that crushed it for this
brand.

-- 27 of 32 --

#2 WHITELIST ADS
Instead of running ads from your
business page, simply use a creator’s
page. SAME AD. DIFFERENT PAGE.
If you don’t have access to creators, then
have your team create pages related to
your niche. examples:
“HealthyFinds” or “MyDogLovesThese”
Doing this DROPS your CPMS significantly!
👈
Improvement in CPM
Improvement in CPC
+57%
+41%

-- 28 of 32 --

#3 RUN EVERY
CAMPAIGN
Every year we see a 40-60% growth for
this brand. Year to date spend: $7M
One of the biggest reasons is running all
types of campaigns.
Adv+, Shop Ads, Cost Caps, CBO,
Pure TOF, MOF, BOF, and PP.
Almost EVERY account we audit
has at least 2-4 of these missing.
Don’t just rely on your Adv+ to carry your
account (even if it is best performer).
YOU CAN’T NOT HAVE A BOF.
It’s free money. Usually at 3+ ROAS.

-- 29 of 32 --

#4 FIX YOUR OFFER
META’s job is to get traffic to your website.
Once they’ve clicked the ad & landed on
your site, the offer needs to be so good
visitors purchase instantly.
Otherwise you’re going to rely on
remarketing them like crazy and chasing
them on every platform (higher cost).
Here’s how we took a client from a sub
1% conversion rate to a 2.75% &
increased AOV massively.
That means without changing META, our
ads efficiency over 2-Xed.
Ebooks, Bottle, Course, Shipping
